title: Implement VACUUM
description: Why this issue exists and what needs to be done: pgrust does not yet implement PostgreSQL-style VACUUM support. Add the SQL-visible VACUUM command path and the underlying cleanup behavior needed to reclaim dead tuples and maintain storage and catalog state with PostgreSQL-compatible semantics where practical. Wire the feature through the parser, command handling, storage/access layers, and any catalog bookkeeping it needs, and add validation for basic VACUUM behavior.

title: Adjust beads closeout for local-only workflow
description: Why this issue exists and what needs to be done: AGENTS.md still requires remote push steps, but this repo is not using remote beads sync right now. Update the documented session-completion workflow to stop at local commit and note that remote sync is optional until remote access is configured.
